verses.1: Every wise woman builds her house,
verses.2: He who walks in his uprightness fears the LORD,
verses.3: The fool’s talk brings a rod to his back,
verses.4: Where no oxen are, the crib is clean,
verses.5: A truthful witness will not lie,
verses.6: A scoffer seeks wisdom, and doesn’t find it,
verses.7: Stay away from a foolish man,
verses.8: The wisdom of the prudent is to think about his way,
verses.9: Fools mock at making atonement for sins,
verses.10: The heart knows its own bitterness and joy;
verses.11: The house of the wicked will be overthrown,
verses.12: There is a way which seems right to a man,
verses.13: Even in laughter the heart may be sorrowful,
verses.14: The unfaithful will be repaid for his own ways;
verses.16: A wise man fears and shuns evil,
verses.17: He who is quick to become angry will commit folly,
verses.19: The evil bow down before the good,
verses.20: The poor person is shunned even by his own neighbor,
verses.21: He who despises his neighbor sins,
verses.22: Don’t they go astray who plot evil?
verses.23: In all hard work there is profit,
verses.24: The crown of the wise is their riches,
verses.26: In the fear of the LORD is a secure fortress,
verses.27: The fear of the LORD is a fountain of life,
verses.28: In the multitude of people is the king’s glory,
verses.29: He who is slow to anger has great understanding,
verses.30: The life of the body is a heart at peace,
verses.31: He who oppresses the poor shows contempt for his Maker,
verses.32: The wicked is brought down in his calamity,
verses.33: Wisdom rests in the heart of one who has understanding,
verses.35: The king’s favor is toward a servant who deals wisely,
